title: Fang (corvette group)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Fang}}
'''Fang''' was a group of four [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] that served with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They attempted to prevent the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Cathleen]]'' from escaping into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], however all four of the vessels were destroyed.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
